title: chore(deps): update dependency rollup to v1.1.2
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| rollup | devDependencies | patch | `1.1.0` -> `1.1.2` | [source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rollup/rollup</summary>

### [`v1.1.2`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​112)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.1.1...v1.1.2)

_2019-01-21_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Tree-shaken dynamic imports no longer leave behind `undefined` entries in the bundle information ([#​2663](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2663))
-   Dynamic imports in dynamically imported files could lead to crashes and would not always create new chunks ([#​2664](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2664))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2663](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2663): Do not include tree-shaken dynamic imports in bundle information ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2664](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2664): Properly handle dynamic imports declared in dynamically imported files ([@​everdimension](https://togithub.com/everdimension))

### [`v1.1.1`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​111)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.1)

_2019-01-19_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Make sure object prototype methods are not considered to be falsy when tree-shaking ([#​2652](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2652))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2652](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2652): Make sure object prototype methods are not considered to be falsy ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))
-   [#​2654](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2654): Use correct signature for `this.setAssetSource` in docs ([@​everdimension](https://togithub.com/everdimension))
-   [#​2656](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2656): Swap descriptions for `[extname]` and `[ext]` in docs ([@​tivac](https://togithub.com/tivac))

</details>
